predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company has the status of a small company for purposes of the provision.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company has the status of a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company has the status of a parent company.

predicates.name: last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: employee_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee criterion for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: net_turnover_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover criterion for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total criterion for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the criteria for micro-company status in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company under the provision.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The company's annual average number of employees in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding value added tax in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total in the financial year.
